---
page-layout: full
body-classes: home-page
---

::: {.home-hero}
![](images/banner.jpg){.hero-image}
:::

::: {.home-split}
::: {.home-left}
![](images/profile.jpg){.profile-photo}

# Salvatore Viola

PhD Student in Economics  
Universitat de Barcelona  
<sviola@ub.edu>


<div class="social-links">
  <a href="https://github.com/salvatoreviola" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="GitHub">
    <i class="bi bi-github"></i>
  </a>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/salvatore-viola-03078a1b8/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="LinkedIn">
    <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
  </a>
</div>
:::

::: {.home-right}
# Welcome

I am thrid-year PhD Student in Economics at the Universitat de Barcelona affiliated with the Quantitative Regional Analysis Group (AQR-IREA). My research interest include the geography of innovation and science with a particular focus on environmental-realted science and innovation as well as migration.
:::
:::
